overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at sunset, ascending stairs from a plaza, passing a neon-lit restaurant, and strolling along a waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking a neon skyline across the water. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with orange-teal color grading characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a wide concrete staircase in an urban plaza at dusk. The camera ascends the stairs, passing a person sitting on the steps and another walking down. An orange-glass building looms in the background against the sunset sky.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a building overhang past the CHADS restaurant with its neon signage and outdoor seating area. A food cart with an illuminated umbrella stands on the right. The ground is paved with patterned tiles, and potted plants line the walkway.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered restaurant area onto an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The walkway features a metal railing overlooking the water, with the futuristic city skyline visible across the water against the orange sunset sky.

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases the stunning waterfront view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at dusk. The camera walks along the water's edge, passing under an elevated bridge structure while neon-lit skyscrapers tower across the water, their lights reflecting on the calm surface. The orange sunset sky contrasts with the teal and purple neon lights of the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling urban plaza up toward a serene, neon-lit waterfront promenade at sunset. It begins by ascending a wide concrete staircase past pedestrians, with a towering orange-glass building framing the dusk sky. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza shifts into a covered walkway, passing the neon signage and outdoor seating of CHADS restaurant and an illuminated food cart. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the overhang onto a palm-lined promenade, where a metal railing separates the patterned tiles from the water. Finally, the path leads under an elevated bridge structure, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk skyline of teal and purple skyscrapers reflecting across the calm surface of the water under a deep orange sky.
